since_last: 65% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.95%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC +3.48% · Gold +1.56% · Nasdaq100 +1.10%. 65% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.95%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.95%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.22%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.58%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +12.82%, OKTA +11.09%, S +7.22%, DELL +6.89%, PANW +6.81%. Laggards: IBM -24.58%, SKHY -8.63%, ISRG -6.67%, ARM -6.27%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.75% at $136.71
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
